title: EduRAG — Dual RAG Educativo (D-RAG-E) v2.0.0
description: EduRAG (Portale Scuola AI) is a SaaS platform implementing the Dual RAG Educativo (D-RAG-E) architecture — a two-tier hierarchical Retrieval-Augmented Generation system for sovereign AI integration in national education systems. RAG Layer 1 grounds responses in ministerial curricula; RAG Layer 2 personalises narrative per institution based on adopted textbooks. Fully compliant with EU AI Act, GDPR, and Italian MIM 2025 Guidelines. Stack: vLLM + LLaMA 3.1 70B + sentence-transformers (multilingual-e5-large) + Qdrant + FastAPI + PostgreSQL. Docker-compose ready for SuperPOD deployment.
